title: Input Choice Set Tile
description: A set of selectable choices. Compiles to AC 1.6 Input.ChoiceSet. Style 'compact' renders as a dropdown, 'expanded' as a radio (or checkbox if multi-select) list, 'filtered' as a typeahead.

id.description: Unique input id — the key under which the selected value(s) is submitted to the host.

label.description: Human-readable label rendered above the choices.

placeholder.description: Ghost text shown for compact / filtered styles when no selection has been made.

value.description: Initial selected value. For multi-select, comma-separated string.
Value submitted when this choice is selected.

isMultiSelect.description: Allow more than one choice to be selected.

style.description: compact = dropdown, expanded = radio/checkbox list, filtered = typeahead.

wrap.description: Wrap choice labels that exceed available width.
